backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing capsule storage with Map-based persistence, blob storage integration, access control, feedback system, and public query/update methods for creating, claiming, verifying capsules and managing user profiles.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three high-confidence features: comprehensive diagnostic logging for storage initialization, automated health checks with cycle/network/ACL verification, and root-cause-based fixes for storage availability issues.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files including pages, components, hooks, and utilities with focus on health checks, navigation, capsule management, and domain verification.
frontend/DIAGNOSIS.md: Diagnostic report documenting a UI state management bug in BackendHealthBanner (showing error on undefined isHealthy), the fix applied (strict false check), storage architecture details (Motoko backend with Map storage on IC mainnet), and comprehensive health check implementation.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH-based color system defining light and dark mode CSS variables for background, foreground, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with Google site verification meta tag, AdSense script integration, and root div for React mounting.
frontend/public/ads.txt: AdSense publisher verification file declaring Google publisher ID for ad serving authorization.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component with QueryClientProvider, page routing state machine, initial health check on mount, reminder notification polling, and persistent Header/Footer/BackendHealthBanner/DomainVerification components.
frontend/src/components/BackendHealthBan: Displays a destructive alert banner when backend storage is offline, with diagnostic logging for health check states.
frontend/src/components/CountdownTimer.t: Renders a countdown timer with days, hours, minutes, and seconds until a target time, calling an optional callback when complete.
frontend/src/components/DomainVerificati: Security component that validates the current domain against an allowlist, auto-redirects to the official domain, or displays a full-screen warning for unauthorized domains.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component with branding, caffeine.ai attribution, and navigation links to feedback, privacy, and security pages.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with logo, desktop/mobile navigation menu, and active page highlighting for home, open capsule, my capsules, verify, and security pages.
frontend/src/components/OfficialLinkBann: Banner displaying the official CapsuleVault URL with a copy-to-clipboard button and security shield icon.
frontend/src/components/ReminderToggle.t: Toggle component for setting/removing browser notifications 24h and 1h before capsule unlock, handling notification permissions and local storage. (Content truncated in source)
frontend/src/components/VerifiedBadge.ts: Badge component with tooltip showing official CapsuleVault verification status and integrity hash for capsules.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages backend actor instances with Internet Identity authentication, invalidating dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, providing login/logout functionality, identity management, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for backend operations including capsule creation, claiming, listing, and feedback submission, with utilities for generating claim codes, commit IDs, and timestamps.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom design tokens defining a soft, calming color palette for light and dark modes with blue-purple primary colors.
frontend/src/lib/healthCheck.ts: Comprehensive health check utility that validates canister ID, network configuration, actor creation, backend responsiveness, and authentication state.
frontend/src/lib/reminders.ts: Local storage-based reminder system for capsule unlocks with notification tracking at 24h, 1h, and unlock time intervals, including permission management.
frontend/src/lib/vaultKey.ts: Vault Key utilities for generating, hashing (SHA-256), and managing VK-prefixed keys stored in localStorage for capsule access control.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CapsuleViewPage.tsx: Page component displaying unlocked capsule details including metadata, content, verification status, and time-locked duration calculations for both love and prediction capsules.
Displays a receipt page after capsule creation, showing the claim code with copy/share/download functionality and instructions for accessing the capsule later.
frontend/src/pages/CreateCapsulePage.tsx: Multi-step form for creating love or prediction capsules with fields for message/prediction content, unlock date/time, reminder settings, and backend health checks before submission.
frontend/src/pages/FeedbackPage.tsx: Allows users to submit feedback comments (max 250 chars) with rate limiting, displays approved feedback, and generates device IDs for tracking submissions.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page with hero section, navigation buttons to create/open capsules, capsule type descriptions (message and prediction), and ad placeholders.
frontend/src/pages/MyCapsules.tsx: Displays user's capsules retrieved by vault key hash, showing lock status and unlock dates, with functionality to export all claim codes to a text file.
frontend/src/pages/OpenCapsulePage.tsx: Page for opening time-locked capsules by entering a claim code; displays countdown timer, handles capsule retrieval and expiry checking, and shows unlock status with reminder toggle functionality.
frontend/src/pages/SafetyPrivacyPage.tsx: Informational page explaining CapsuleVault's privacy model (no accounts, private claim codes) and responsible use guidelines, emphasizing user control and content responsibility.
frontend/src/pages/SecurityPage.tsx: Security awareness page displaying the official CapsuleVault URL with copy functionality and guidance on verifying the legitimate site to prevent phishing attacks.
frontend/src/pages/VerifyCapsulePage.tsx: Page for verifying capsule existence by claim code; displays verification results including creation timestamp, unlock date/time, and confirmation that a capsule was properly locked.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support for maintaining state across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended theme settings for borders/shadows/animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking for CapsuleVault web application with Google AdSense integration. Documents a storage initialization failure issue after v37 deployment and includes features for diagnostic logging, health checks, and fixes to restore storage availability.
